description_long: This is a rustic outdoor bench constructed primarily from weathered wooden planks, featuring a simple yet sturdy design. The seat consists of three wide, parallel wooden slats, while the backrest is made up of three horizontal wooden slats supported by two vertical posts. The bench is supported by two robust wooden legs on each end, connected by a horizontal stretcher for added stability. The entire structure sits atop a rectangular section of stone or concrete paving, suggesting it is intended for fixed placement in an outdoor setting. The wood appears aged and untreated, giving the bench a natural, rugged appearance suitable for parks or public gardens. There are no armrests, and the bench is designed for communal seating.
description: A rustic wooden outdoor bench with a slatted seat and backrest, supported by sturdy wooden legs and set on a stone or concrete base. The design is simple, weathered, and ideal for parks or public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three-slat backrest, slatted seat, and full width of the bench on a stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden planks and the depth of the seat, with visible leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest's horizontal slats and the supporting vertical posts, as well as the stone base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bench's profile, leg construction, and the edge of the stone base.
attribute_leg_design: two thick wooden end supports with horizontal stretcher
